task_completion.description: Navigate to the Back Office Configuration or Discounts/Coupons section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screen indicating the Back Office, specifically a Configuration, Payments, or Discounts/Coupons settings page.

task_completion.description: Create a new payment or discount method named 'Marketing Voucher'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list of payment methods or discounts that includes 'Marketing Voucher', or a creation form filled out and saved with this name.

task_completion.description: Start a new 'Dine In' order in the POS interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main POS ordering screen with an indicator or tag showing that the current order type is set to 'Dine In'.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Cola' to the current order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Cola' listed in the current order ticket or cart on the POS screen.

task_completion.description: Settle the order using the newly created 'Marketing Voucher'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a payment screen, checkout confirmation, or receipt showing that 'Marketing Voucher' was selected and applied to pay for the order balance.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to configure the voucher and process the order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the POS application UI being used, not a terminal window or command prompt.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard application windows, buttons, and menus being clicked or navigated, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database editors to insert the voucher or order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of SQLite browsers, database management tools, or scripts used to bypass the UI.
